## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce GrowthX's capabilities to Prophecy's new marketing leadership and align on potential collaboration opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/8r3kcjx9PWcypLhNnhR46RwWP46sBhj7?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Prophecy has shifted focus to target data analysts and analytics leaders with their AI data prep and analysis tools](https://fathom.video/share/8r3kcjx9PWcypLhNnhR46RwWP46sBhj7?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [GrowthX will conduct a strategy sprint to realign efforts with Prophecy's new direction and audience](https://fathom.video/share/8r3kcjx9PWcypLhNnhR46RwWP46sBhj7?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
  - [Prophecy's CEO (Raj) is cautious about external content creation but open to proven strategies for AEO and GEO](https://fathom.video/share/8r3kcjx9PWcypLhNnhR46RwWP46sBhj7?tab=summary&timestamp=1658.0)
  - [The team aims to demonstrate quick wins in AEO and GEO to justify continued partnership](https://fathom.video/share/8r3kcjx9PWcypLhNnhR46RwWP46sBhj7?tab=summary&timestamp=1833.0)

## Topics

### Prophecy's Current Market Position

  - [Shifted from targeting engineers to data analysts and analytics leaders](https://fathom.video/share/8r3kcjx9PWcypLhNnhR46RwWP46sBhj7?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [Focusing on Prophecy Express offering: fixed-cost, objective-based package for teams of 20](https://fathom.video/share/8r3kcjx9PWcypLhNnhR46RwWP46sBhj7?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
  - [Main competitors: Julius (AI analytics), Alteryx (incumbent), Matillion (not performing well)](https://fathom.video/share/8r3kcjx9PWcypLhNnhR46RwWP46sBhj7?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
  - [Market space for AI data prep and analysis is still undefined and evolving](https://fathom.video/share/8r3kcjx9PWcypLhNnhR46RwWP46sBhj7?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)

### GrowthX's Capabilities and Approach

  - [Utilizes Augment Code platform for scaling high-quality content production](https://fathom.video/share/8r3kcjx9PWcypLhNnhR46RwWP46sBhj7?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
  - [Implements agentic workflows and custom pipelines for efficient content creation](https://fathom.video/share/8r3kcjx9PWcypLhNnhR46RwWP46sBhj7?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)
  - [Demonstrated success with clients like Augment and Lovable in AEO, GEO, and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/8r3kcjx9PWcypLhNnhR46RwWP46sBhj7?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [Emphasizes signals-based approach for aggressive growth and market learning](https://fathom.video/share/8r3kcjx9PWcypLhNnhR46RwWP46sBhj7?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)

### Prophecy's Marketing Challenges and Needs

  - [New messaging required for recently targeted personas](https://fathom.video/share/8r3kcjx9PWcypLhNnhR46RwWP46sBhj7?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Website relaunch planned for Friday with positive initial feedback](https://fathom.video/share/8r3kcjx9PWcypLhNnhR46RwWP46sBhj7?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
  - [Need to increase marketplace visibility for new Express product](https://fathom.video/share/8r3kcjx9PWcypLhNnhR46RwWP46sBhj7?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Focus areas: AEO, GEO, and potentially influencer marketing](https://fathom.video/share/8r3kcjx9PWcypLhNnhR46RwWP46sBhj7?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)

### Strategy Sprint and Collaboration

  - [GrowthX to conduct a 4-week strategy sprint to realign efforts](https://fathom.video/share/8r3kcjx9PWcypLhNnhR46RwWP46sBhj7?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
  - [Key participants: Will, Cody, Raj (CEO/acting head of product marketing), and GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/8r3kcjx9PWcypLhNnhR46RwWP46sBhj7?tab=summary&timestamp=1623.0)
  - [Goals: Define new audience, expectations, market positioning, and content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/8r3kcjx9PWcypLhNnhR46RwWP46sBhj7?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)
  - [Address concerns about previous content direction and quality](https://fathom.video/share/8r3kcjx9PWcypLhNnhR46RwWP46sBhj7?tab=summary&timestamp=1658.0)

### Content Strategy Considerations

  - [Potential removal of outdated content not aligned with new direction](https://fathom.video/share/8r3kcjx9PWcypLhNnhR46RwWP46sBhj7?tab=summary&timestamp=1658.0)
  - [Focus on practical content for data analysts and technical feature announcements](https://fathom.video/share/8r3kcjx9PWcypLhNnhR46RwWP46sBhj7?tab=summary&timestamp=1736.0)
  - [Balance between Raj's vision and GrowthX's proven growth strategies](https://fathom.video/share/8r3kcjx9PWcypLhNnhR46RwWP46sBhj7?tab=summary&timestamp=1658.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule kickoff meeting for strategy sprint with Will, Cody, Raj, and GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/8r3kcjx9PWcypLhNnhR46RwWP46sBhj7?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)
  - [GrowthX to send follow-up email to coordinate meeting time (morning preferred due to Raj's location)](https://fathom.video/share/8r3kcjx9PWcypLhNnhR46RwWP46sBhj7?tab=summary&timestamp=1973.0)
  - [Prepare examples of successful AEO and GEO campaigns for Raj's review](https://fathom.video/share/8r3kcjx9PWcypLhNnhR46RwWP46sBhj7?tab=summary&timestamp=1833.0)
  - [Develop plan to demonstrate quick wins in AEO and GEO within the current contract period](https://fathom.video/share/8r3kcjx9PWcypLhNnhR46RwWP46sBhj7?tab=summary&timestamp=1833.0)
